ques: Find flights from Chicago to London on 20 December and return on 23 December.
answer: Round-trip flights from Chicago (ORD) to London (LHR) departing Sun Dec 20 and returning Wed Dec 23 are available. Best options start at €953 (Air Canada/United, 1 stop, 10 hr); the cheapest nonstop is United at €1,073 (8 hr 10 min); the overall cheapest is €885 (Scandinavian Airlines, 1 stop).
